events.name: epidemic
events.description: Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.

events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

governance.rationale: Appoint a strong leader to guide us through crisis.

meta_awareness.insight: Fen Marsh asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Rust Vega whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Nova Sol dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
